records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't... go on anymore...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't... go on anymore...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't... go on anymore...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... how I'll die...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... how I'll die...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... how I'll die...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I was just doing my best...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I was just doing my best...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I was just doing my best...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not blame yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not blame yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not blame yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Ecclesia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Ecclesia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is yours?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is yours?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is yours?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't... have a name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't... have a name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't... have a name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I shall put a roof over your head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I shall put a roof over your head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I shall put a roof over your head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In return, I would like to propose an offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In return, I would like to propose an offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In return, I would like to propose an offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An offer...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An offer...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An offer...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want it too. A name, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want it too. A name, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want it too. A name, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your name shall be Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your name shall be Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your name shall be Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't hesitate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I followed your light here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I followed your light here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I followed your light here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... haven't committed a sin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... haven't committed a sin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... haven't committed a sin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am truly sorry, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am truly sorry, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am truly sorry, Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I was advised to not take personal action...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I was advised to not take personal action...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I was advised to not take personal action...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... not a sinner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... not a sinner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... not a sinner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...! I'm not a traitor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...! I'm not a traitor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...! I'm not a traitor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just trying...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just trying...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just trying...

records.m_Talk_ENG: to uphold my duties...
records.m_Talk_DEU: to uphold my duties...
records.m_Talk_FRA: to uphold my duties...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... am I going to die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... am I going to die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... am I going to die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then tell me, Her Eminence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then tell me, Her Eminence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then tell me, Her Eminence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The night is darkest just before sunrise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although we will not be together right now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although we will not be together right now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although we will not be together right now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a story many people feared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a story many people feared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a story many people feared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I became the darkness that everyone feared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I became the darkness that everyone feared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I became the darkness that everyone feared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be able to return to Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be able to return to Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be able to return to Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't... go on anymore...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't... go on anymore...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't... go on anymore...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... how I'll die...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... how I'll die...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... how I'll die...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, girl?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, girl?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, girl?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that you had protected the refugees from the monsters all by yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone as young as you, I admire your courage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I was just doing my best...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I was just doing my best...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I was just doing my best...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the monsters... got the mother who was protecting her child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If only I was a bit stronger, I could've saved her too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not blame yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not blame yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not blame yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you had not stepped forward, many refugees would have lost their lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Ecclesia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Ecclesia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is yours?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is yours?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is yours?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't... have a name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't... have a name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't... have a name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was told that I shouldn't be given one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where is your family? Do you have a place to return to?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I used to live with my mom, but she died from the plague recently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the adults... burned down my house, saying that they can't let a house of a plague patient remain.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI see.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I shall put a roof over your head.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I shall put a roof over your head.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I shall put a roof over your head.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In return, I would like to propose an offer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In return, I would like to propose an offer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In return, I would like to propose an offer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An offer...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An offer...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An offer...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Become a paladin and join the pilgrimage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you become stronger through training, you will be able to protect more people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A paladin... like you, Miss Ecclesia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never dared to even dream about becoming one before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think... I can do it? I heard that only noble people who have been baptized can become paladins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not worry. What I see in your heart is unmistakable nobility.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I shall bestow you a name, and teach you the way of a Helgon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want it too. A name, that is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want it too. A name, that is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want it too. A name, that is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your name shall be Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your name shall be Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your name shall be Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means, "the utmost courageous one" in Avalonian.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, the Solar Gate's light has discovered Thagirion's Tower.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good news. We will soon rid the Demon Lord from this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The holy war will soon commence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When that day comes, you will also be a proud member of the pilgrimage and not a cadet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Peace will return and the plague will be no more once the Demon Lord is defeated, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no certainty in the future, Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, this is the path we have chosen. There is no room for hesitation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't hesitate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't hesitate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't hesitate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I followed your light here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I followed your light here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I followed your light here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had faith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had faith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had faith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Faith that I could move forward by following the light.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that it was my sole duty to become a member of the pilgrimage and defeat the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But my fate wouldn't allow it so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apprentice Paladin of the pilgrimage, Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I did not expect to see you at the inquisition stand right before the Solar Gate's guard ceremony.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not too late. I will give you one last chance to repent for your sins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... haven't committed a sin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... haven't committed a sin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... haven't committed a sin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You threatened the inquisitor who puts pagans on trial!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those people swung their swords at a child who couldn't even resist!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pagans are still people! Before they spilled blood, they needed to be put on a fair trial!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How dare a paladin who serves the Order speak of protecting pagans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am truly sorry, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am truly sorry, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am truly sorry, Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One day, I saw a child from the refugee camp being captured by the inquisitors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason was that the child was a pagan who believed in blasphemous prophecies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: During the interrogation, they drew their swords at the child. Seeing me there, the child shouted my name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although I was advised to not take personal action...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although I was advised to not take personal action...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although I was advised to not take personal action...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't bear to neglect what was going on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was questioned for aiding a pagan, and...

root.m_Talk_ENG: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: it was only a matter of time... before the hidden mark on my body would be revealed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The brand of the traitor is a mark of sin passed down the king-slayer family of Avalon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The bloodline's descendants were all born with the brand on their chest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How dare a sinner carrying that mark ever dream of becoming a noble paladin. Disgusting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... not a sinner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... not a sinner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... not a sinner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Having the mark of the traitor itself is your sin! And an even greater sin to have hidden it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am wasting my breath discussing this sinner's actions of protecting a pagan!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's wrong to punish someone without a trial!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does being a pagan or having the mark have anything to do with that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear? She's still taking the pagan's side. Guess it's in her blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This trial is wrong! Call Her Eminence! I'm innocent!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to use Her Eminence's reputation even now. How ungrateful of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you no clue that Her Eminence, the one who trusted you and gave you a seat in the pilgrimage, has been brought to trial of heresy?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Because of me... Her Eminence is
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that you do not feel the slightest of guilt for betraying Her Eminence's trust.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly want redemption, do not deny your original sin, traitor!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...! I'm not a traitor...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...! I'm not a traitor...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...! I'm not a traitor...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hang her on the scaffold before she commits even greater sins!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must purify that horrible mark with the sun's fire!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was just trying...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was just trying...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was just trying...

root.m_Talk_ENG: to uphold my duties...
root.m_Talk_DEU: to uphold my duties...
root.m_Talk_FRA: to uphold my duties...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, Mordred.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence...? What are you doing here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When dawn breaks, the Order will bring you to justice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... am I going to die?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... am I going to die?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... am I going to die?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When fear exceeds the depths of faith, one loses rationality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What they fear is the brand of the traitor, not your sin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as that mark is on you, the Order will stop at no lengths to get rid of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then tell me, Her Eminence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then tell me, Her Eminence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then tell me, Her Eminence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you say that I deserve to die because I have this mark... I will accept my fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence...? Why are you opening the door...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot lose you all because of a trivial mark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even if I keep living... what am I supposed to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I had a purpose before... but I don't know anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like... I'm trapped in endless darkness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The night is darkest just before sunrise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not be discouraged and wait for your time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although we will not be together right now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although we will not be together right now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although we will not be together right now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: on the day that the pilgrimage and I slay the Demon Lord, I will come to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when we are in slumber, the end of the world is nigh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a story many people feared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a story many people feared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a story many people feared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of ignoring reality, I wanted to become the light that brightens the world from darkness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But when I found out what the mark I had meant...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I became the darkness that everyone feared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I became the darkness that everyone feared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I became the darkness that everyone feared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although it was difficult to light, it's such a cozy fire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, I even found a rabbit that hadn't rotted yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's great to be able to eat nutritious meat instead of tree bark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I should pick myself up and go look for the fairy again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I can make my wish and remove this cursed mark...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be able to return to Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be able to return to Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be able to return to Elysion.
